## Checklist

- [ ] `uv run ruff check` passes
- [ ] `uv run ruff format --check` passes
- [ ] `uv run mypy` passes
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes (new tests added for new behavior)
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md`, `docs/`, `examples/`) where relevant
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under the `Unreleased` section
- [ ] Change respects the "thin layer over Zvec" scope
